signals.summary: Detected 52 classified BSW healthcare hiring signals. Role mix: Attending Physician / Specialist: 37; Surgeon / High-Income Specialist: 4; Healthcare Recruiting Signal: 9; Advanced Practice Provider: 1; Healthcare Executive / Leadership: 1. Estimated relocations: 32.3. Estimated housing demand range: $16,845,000 - $40,762,500. Examples: Physicians; Esther H., Cardiothoracic Surgeon; In-house Recruiters; Featured Recruiters; Senior Physician Recruiter; APP Recruiter; Recruiters; Additional Recruiters
signals.why_it_matters: BSW healthcare hiring is a leading indicator of future relocation demand. Physicians, specialists, healthcare executives, advanced practice providers, and clinical staff create housing demand before they begin searching for a Realtor.
